<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Vijayan S – Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fira+Code:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
    /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   ROOT & RESET
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --bg:#05060f;--bg2:#0a0d1a;--bg3:#0d1120;
  --accent:#00d4ff;--accent2:#7b2fff;--accent3:#ff2ff8;
  --green:#00ff88;
  --text:#e8eaf6;--muted:#6b7094;--muted2:#9aa0c4;
  --card:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);--border:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  --glow-c:rgba(0,212,255,0.15);--glow-p:rgba(123,47,255,0.15);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;line-height:1.6}
a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit}
img{max-width:100%;display:block}
section{padding:100px 6vw}
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   SCROLLBAR
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg)}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--accent2);border-radius:3px}
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   AMBIENT BG GRID
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
body::before{
  content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(0,212,255,0.03)1px,transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(0,212,255,0.03)1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:60px 60px;
  animation:gridScroll 30s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes gridScroll{to{background-position:60px 60px}}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   NAVBAR
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
nav{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:999;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:16px 6vw;
  background:rgba(5,6,15,0.8);backdrop-filter:blur(18px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  animation:slideDown .6s ease both;
}
@keyframes slideDown{from{transform:translateY(-70px);opacity:0}to{transform:none;opacity:1}}
.nav-logo{
  font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:1.1rem;letter-spacing:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:24px;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{
  color:var(--muted);font-size:.78rem;letter-spacing:1px;
  text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .2s;position:relative;
}
.nav-links a::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-3px;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:var(--accent);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .2s;
}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--accent)}
.nav-links a:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}
.hamburger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;padding:4px}
.hamburger span{width:22px;height:2px;background:var(--accent);transition:.3s}
.mobile-menu{
  display:none;position:fixed;top:60px;left:0;right:0;z-index:998;
  background:rgba(5,6,15,0.97);backdrop-filter:blur(18px);
  padding:20px 6vw;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.mobile-menu.open{display:block}
.mobile-menu ul{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px}
.mobile-menu a{color:var(--muted2);font-size:.9rem;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
:root{
  --bg:#0a0e0a;--surface:#0f1a0f;--card:#111f11;--border:#1a3a1a;
  --green:#00ff41;--green2:#39ff14;--green-dim:#00c832;
  --green-glow:rgba(0,255,65,0.15);--text:#d4f5d4;--muted:#5a8a5a;
  --mono:'Fira Code',monospace;--sans:'Inter',sans-serif;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--sans);overflow-x:hidden;}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg);}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--green-dim);}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:200;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:1rem 5%;background:rgba(10,14,10,0.92);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.nav-logo{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.9rem;color:var(--green);}
.nav-logo span{color:var(--muted);}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:1.5rem;list-style:none;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.nav-links a{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--green);}
.nav-links a::before{content:"./";color:var(--border);}
.hamburger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;padding:4px;}
.hamburger span{display:block;width:22px;height:2px;background:var(--green);}
@media(max-width:700px){
  .nav-links{display:none;position:fixed;top:56px;left:0;right:0;background:var(--bg);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:1.25rem;padding:1.25rem 0;}
  .nav-links.open{display:flex;}
  .hamburger{display:flex;}
}

/* MATRIX — full page persistent */
#matrixCanvas{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:.07;}

/* all content above canvas */
nav,section,.hero,.photo-section,footer,.chatbot-bubble,.chatbot-panel{position:relative;z-index:1;}
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   HERO
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
#home{
  min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;padding-top:90px;gap:40px;position:relative;z-index:1;
}
.blob{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(100px);pointer-events:none;z-index:0}
.blob1{width:500px;height:500px;background:rgba(0,212,255,0.08);top:-10%;left:-12%;animation:blobFloat 8s ease-in-out infinite}
.blob2{width:400px;height:400px;background:rgba(123,47,255,0.1);bottom:-5%;right:-10%;animation:blobFloat 10s ease-in-out infinite reverse}
.blob3{width:250px;height:250px;background:rgba(255,47,248,0.07);top:40%;left:38%;animation:blobFloat 6s ease-in-out infinite 2s}
@keyframes blobFloat{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)}50%{transform:translate(30px,-25px) scale(1.1)}}

.hero-left{position:relative;z-index:2;flex:1;max-width:580px;animation:fadeUp .9s .2s ease both}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(40px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}

.hero-badge{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  background:rgba(0,212,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.22);
  border-radius:20px;padding:5px 14px;margin-bottom:22px;
  font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:.73rem;color:var(--accent);
  animation:fadeUp .9s .5s ease both;
}
.badge-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--green);animation:blink 1.4s step-end infinite}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0}}

.hero-greeting{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:.85rem;letter-spacing:4px;color:var(--muted2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px}
.hero-name{
  font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4.5vw,3.5rem);font-weight:900;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:18px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff 20%,var(--accent) 60%,var(--accent2));
  background-size:200%;-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  animation:shimmer 5s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes shimmer{0%{background-position:0%}100%{background-position:200%}}

.hero-role{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.role-prefix{color:var(--muted2);font-size:1rem;font-weight:300}
#typed{font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:1rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:500;min-width:220px}
.cursor{animation:blink .75s step-end infinite;color:var(--accent)}

.hero-desc{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--muted2);line-height:1.85;max-width:460px;margin-bottom:32px;animation:fadeUp 1s .7s ease both}
.hero-desc strong{color:var(--accent2)}

.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;animation:fadeUp 1s .85s ease both;margin-bottom:32px}
.btn{
  padding:11px 26px;border-radius:6px;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;
  letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;
  gap:7px;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;border:none;
}
.btn:hover{transform:translateY(-3px)}
.btn-primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));color:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,212,255,.25)}
.btn-primary:hover{box-shadow:0 0 35px rgba(0,212,255,.45)}
.btn-outline{background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.35);color:var(--accent)}
.btn-outline:hover{background:rgba(0,212,255,.07);border-color:var(--accent)}
.btn-outline2{background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(123,47,255,.4);color:var(--accent2)}
.btn-outline2:hover{background:rgba(123,47,255,.08)}

.hero-tags{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;animation:fadeUp 1s 1s ease both}
.htag{
  padding:4px 12px;border-radius:4px;font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:.7rem;
  letter-spacing:1.5px;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);
  background:var(--card);transition:.2s;
}
.htag:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent)}

.hero-right{position:relative;z-index:2;flex-shrink:0;animation:fadeUp .9s .45s ease both}
.avatar-wrap{position:relative;width:280px;height:280px}
.orbit{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;border:2px dashed rgba(0,212,255,.2);animation:spin 20s linear infinite}
.orbit1{inset:-20px}
.orbit2{inset:-44px;border-color:rgba(123,47,255,.15);border-style:solid;animation-duration:32s;animation-direction:reverse}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.o-dot{position:absolute;width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;top:-5px;left:calc(50% - 5px);background:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--accent)}
.o-dot2{top:auto;bottom:-5px;background:var(--accent2);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--accent2)}
.avatar-img{
  width:280px;height:280px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;
  border:3px solid rgba(0,212,255,.3);
  box-shadow:0 0 60px rgba(0,212,255,.2),0 0 120px rgba(123,47,255,.1);
  animation:float 4s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-14px)}}
.stat-chip{
  position:absolute;background:rgba(10,13,26,.9);border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.2);
  backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-radius:10px;padding:9px 14px;
  animation:fadeUp 1s 1.1s ease both;
}
.stat-chip .sv{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);display:block}
.stat-chip .sl{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px}
.sc1{top:8px;left:-65px}
.sc2{bottom:8px;right:-65px;border-color:rgba(123,47,255,.25)}
.sc2 .sv{color:var(--accent2)}

.scroll-hint{
  position:absolute;bottom:28px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  color:var(--muted);font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
  animation:fadeIn 2s 1.8s ease both;z-index:2;
}
.scroll-mouse{width:20px;height:34px;border:2px solid rgba(0,212,255,.3);border-radius:10px;display:flex;justify-content:center;padding-top:6px}
.scroll-wheel{width:3px;height:6px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;animation:swScroll 1.6s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes swScroll{0%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}100%{transform:translateY(9px);opacity:0}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
/* HERO */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:7rem 5% 4rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.hero-inner{position:relative;z-index:2;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:center;max-width:1100px;width:100%;margin:0 auto;}
.hero-prompt{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.75rem;color:var(--green-dim);margin-bottom:1rem;}
.hero-prompt::before{content:"$ ";color:var(--muted);}
.hero-name{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:clamp(2.5rem,6vw,5rem);font-weight:700;line-height:1;color:var(--green);text-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,255,65,.35);margin-bottom:.5rem;letter-spacing:-.02em;}
.hero-sub{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:clamp(.9rem,2vw,1.1rem);color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:2rem;}
.hero-sub .cursor{display:inline-block;width:2px;height:1.1em;background:var(--green);margin-left:2px;vertical-align:middle;animation:blink 1s step-end infinite;}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0;}}
.hero-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem;}
.htag{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.7rem;padding:.3rem .75rem;border:1px solid var(--green-dim);color:var(--green);border-radius:2px;background:rgba(0,255,65,.05);}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.btn{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.8rem;padding:.65rem 1.5rem;border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s;display:inline-block;}
.btn-green{background:var(--green);color:#000;border:none;font-weight:700;}
.btn-green:hover{background:var(--green2);box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,65,.4);}
.btn-outline{background:transparent;color:var(--green);border:1px solid var(--green-dim);}
.btn-outline:hover{background:rgba(0,255,65,.08);box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(0,255,65,.2);}

/* terminal */
.terminal{background:#060d06;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(0,255,65,.08);}
.terminal-bar{background:#0d170d;padding:.6rem 1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.t-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;}
.t-dot.r{background:#ff5f56;}.t-dot.y{background:#ffbd2e;}.t-dot.g{background:#27c93f;}
.terminal-title{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);margin-left:auto;}
.terminal-body{padding:1.25rem;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.8;}
.t-line{display:flex;gap:.5rem;}
.t-prompt{color:var(--green-dim);flex-shrink:0;}
.t-cmd{color:var(--text);}
.t-out{color:var(--muted);padding-left:1rem;}
.t-hi{color:var(--green);}
.t-cursor-line{display:flex;gap:.5rem;}
.t-cursor{display:inline-block;width:8px;height:.9em;background:var(--green);animation:blink 1s step-end infinite;vertical-align:middle;}
@media(max-width:800px){.hero-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.terminal{display:none;}}

/* PHOTO */
.photo-section{padding:4rem 5% 2rem;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;justify-content:center;}
.photo-frame-outer{position:relative;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.photo-ring{position:absolute;width:280px;height:270px;border-radius:50%;border:2px dashed rgba(0,255,65,.35);animation:spin-ring 12s linear infinite;}
.photo-ring-2{position:absolute;width:310px;height:310px;border-radius:50%;border:1px dashed rgba(0,255,65,.15);animation:spin-ring 20s linear infinite reverse;}
@keyframes spin-ring{from{transform:rotate(0deg);}to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
.photo-ring::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:-5px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 12px 4px rgba(0,255,65,.6);}
.photo-ring::after{content:"";position:absolute;bottom:-5px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green-dim);box-shadow:0 0 8px 3px rgba(0,200,50,.5);}
.photo-wrap{position:relative;z-index:2;width:230px;height:230px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;border:3px solid var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(0,255,65,.08),0 0 40px rgba(0,255,65,.25),0 0 80px rgba(0,255,65,.08);transition:box-shadow .3s,transform .3s;}
.photo-wrap:hover{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(0,255,65,.15),0 0 60px rgba(0,255,65,.45),0 0 100px rgba(0,255,65,.12);transform:scale(1.03);}
.photo-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;}
.photo-wrap::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 3px,rgba(0,255,65,.03) 3px,rgba(0,255,65,.03) 4px);opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;pointer-events:none;}
.photo-wrap:hover::after{opacity:1;}
.bracket{position:absolute;width:22px;height:22px;border-color:var(--green);border-style:solid;opacity:.7;}
.bracket.tl{top:-16px;left:-16px;border-width:2px 0 0 2px;}
.bracket.tr{top:-16px;right:-16px;border-width:2px 2px 0 0;}
.bracket.bl{bottom:-16px;left:-16px;border-width:0 0 2px 2px;}
.bracket.br{bottom:-16px;right:-16px;border-width:0 2px 2px 0;}
.photo-badge{position:absolute;z-index:3;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.65rem;padding:.3rem .7rem;border-radius:2px;background:#060d06;border:1px solid var(--green-dim);color:var(--green);white-space:nowrap;box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(0,255,65,.2);animation:float-badge 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
.photo-badge.b1{top:18px;right:-80px;animation-delay:0s;}
.photo-badge.b2{bottom:40px;right:-90px;animation-delay:1s;}
.photo-badge.b3{bottom:18px;left:-90px;animation-delay:.5s;}
.photo-badge.b4{top:40px;left:-85px;animation-delay:1.5s;}
@keyframes float-badge{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-5px);}}
@media(max-width:600px){.photo-badge{display:none;}.photo-ring,.photo-ring-2{width:220px;height:220px;}.photo-wrap{width:180px;height:180px;}.photo-ring-2{width:250px;height:250px;}}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   SECTION COMMON
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.sec-label{
  font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:3px;
  color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
}
.sec-label::before{content:'//';color:var(--accent2)}
.sec-title{
  font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.5rem);font-weight:900;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}
.sec-desc{color:var(--muted2);max-width:600px;margin-bottom:56px;font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.8}
.gradient-text{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
/* SECTIONS */
section{padding:5rem 5%;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;}
.sec-header{margin-bottom:2.5rem;}
.sec-label{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.7rem;color:var(--green-dim);letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:.4rem;}
.sec-label::before{content:"// ";}
.sec-title{font-size:clamp(1.6rem,3.5vw,2.2rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--text);letter-spacing:-.02em;}
.sec-divider{margin-top:1rem;border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   ABOUT
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
#about{background:var(--bg2);position:relative;z-index:1}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:center}
.about-img-wrap{position:relative}
.about-img{
  width:100%;border-radius:16px;object-fit:cover;
  border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.15);
  box-shadow:0 0 60px rgba(0,212,255,.1);
}
.about-img-badge{
  position:absolute;bottom:-16px;right:-16px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));
  color:#fff;font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:.65rem;
  font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:8px;
  box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,212,255,.4);
}
.about-pills{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:24px}
.apill{
  padding:6px 16px;border-radius:20px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:500;
  background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted2);
  transition:.2s;
}
.apill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent)}
.about-text p{color:var(--muted2);font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.85;margin-bottom:14px}
.stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:36px}
.stat-box{
  background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;
  padding:18px 12px;text-align:center;transition:.25s;
}
.stat-box:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-4px)}
.stat-box .n{
  font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:900;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.stat-box .l{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:4px}

/* terminal card */
.terminal{
  background:#0b1808;border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.15);border-radius:12px;
  overflow:hidden;margin-top:24px;
}
.t-bar{background:#0d1120;padding:10px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.t-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%}
.t-body{padding:16px;font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:.78rem;line-height:2}
.t-line{color:var(--muted2)}
.t-cmd{color:var(--green)}
.t-out{color:var(--accent)}
.t-ok{color:var(--green)}
.t-prompt{color:var(--accent2)}
/* ABOUT */
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3.5rem;align-items:start;}
@media(max-width:700px){.about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
.about-text p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:1rem;line-height:1.75;}
.about-text p strong{color:var(--text);}
.stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;}
.stat-box{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:1.25rem;transition:border-color .2s;}
.stat-box:hover{border-color:var(--green-dim);}
.stat-num{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.3rem;}
.stat-lbl{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);}

/* SKILLS */
.skills-terminal{background:#060d06;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;}
.skills-body{padding:1.5rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(155px,1fr));gap:.75rem;}
.skill-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.78rem;padding:.6rem .9rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:2px;background:var(--card);transition:border-color .2s,color .2s,background .2s;cursor:default;}
.skill-item:hover{border-color:var(--green);color:var(--green);background:rgba(0,255,65,.04);}
.skill-item::before{content:"▸";color:var(--green-dim);flex-shrink:0;}

/* PROJECTS */
.proj-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:1.25rem;}
.proj-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:1.5rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .25s,transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;}
.proj-card::after{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--green),var(--green-dim));transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .3s;}
.proj-card:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1);}
.proj-card:hover{border-color:var(--green-dim);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,255,65,.08);}
.proj-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.proj-icon{font-size:1.4rem;width:42px;height:42px;background:rgba(0,255,65,.06);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.proj-period{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.62rem;color:var(--muted);text-align:right;}
.proj-title{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.65rem;line-height:1.4;color:var(--text);}
.proj-desc{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:1.1rem;}
.proj-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem;}
.ptag{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.62rem;padding:.2rem .55rem;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(0,255,65,.07);color:var(--green-dim);border:1px solid rgba(0,255,65,.2);}

/* EXPERIENCE */
.exp-timeline{position:relative;padding-left:2rem;}
.exp-timeline::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:1px;background:var(--border);}
.exp-item{position:relative;margin-bottom:2.25rem;}
.exp-item::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:-2rem;top:.4rem;width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);transform:translateX(-4px);border:2px solid var(--bg);box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(0,255,65,.5);}
.exp-period{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.68rem;color:var(--green-dim);margin-bottom:.2rem;letter-spacing:.08em;}
.exp-company{font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.35rem;}
.exp-desc{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:.75rem;}
.exp-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem;}

/* EDUCATION */
.edu-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(270px,1fr));gap:1.1rem;}
.edu-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:1.4rem;transition:border-color .2s;}
.edu-card:hover{border-color:var(--green-dim);}
.edu-degree{font-size:.92rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.25rem;}
.edu-school{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:.8rem;}
.edu-score{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);}
.edu-badge{display:inline-block;margin-top:.5rem;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.65rem;padding:.2rem .55rem;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(0,255,65,.07);color:var(--green-dim);border:1px solid rgba(0,255,65,.2);}

/* ── CERTIFICATES SECTION ── */
.cert-intro{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:1.75rem;line-height:1.7;}
.cert-filters{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:2rem;}
.cert-filter-btn{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.7rem;
  padding:.35rem .85rem;border-radius:2px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--card);
  color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;
}
.cert-filter-btn:hover,.cert-filter-btn.active{border-color:var(--green);color:var(--green);background:rgba(0,255,65,.06);}
.cert-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1.5rem;}
.cert-card{
  background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .25s,transform .25s,box-shadow .25s;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.cert-card:hover{border-color:var(--green-dim);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 10px 35px rgba(0,255,65,.1);}
.cert-card.hidden{display:none;}
.cert-thumb{
  width:100%;height:200px;overflow:hidden;
  position:relative;background:#060d06;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.cert-thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;transition:transform .4s;}
.cert-card:hover .cert-thumb img{transform:scale(1.05);}
.cert-thumb-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent 40%,rgba(10,14,10,.85));
  display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding:.75rem;
}
.cert-type-badge{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.6rem;
  padding:.2rem .55rem;border-radius:2px;
  background:rgba(0,255,65,.15);color:var(--green);
  border:1px solid rgba(0,255,65,.3);
}
.cert-body{padding:1.1rem;}
.cert-title{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:.3rem;line-height:1.4;}
.cert-issuer{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.68rem;color:var(--green-dim);margin-bottom:.4rem;}
.cert-date{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.65rem;color:var(--muted);}
.cert-view-btn{
  margin-top:.75rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);
  transition:color .2s;
}
.cert-card:hover .cert-view-btn{color:var(--green);}

/* LIGHTBOX */
.lightbox{
  display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:500;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.9);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:2rem;
}
.lightbox.open{display:flex;}
.lightbox-inner{position:relative;max-width:600px;width:100%;}
.lightbox-inner img{width:100%;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:0 0 60px rgba(0,255,65,.15);}
.lightbox-close{
  position:absolute;top:-1rem;right:-1rem;
  width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--green);color:#000;border:none;
  font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  line-height:1;
}
.lightbox-caption{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);
  text-align:center;margin-top:.75rem;
}
.lightbox-nav{
  position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
  width:36px;height:36px;background:rgba(0,255,65,.15);
  border:1px solid var(--green-dim);border-radius:2px;
  color:var(--green);cursor:pointer;font-size:1.1rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  transition:background .2s;
}
.lightbox-nav:hover{background:rgba(0,255,65,.3);}
.lightbox-nav.prev{left:-50px;}
.lightbox-nav.next{right:-50px;}
@media(max-width:600px){.lightbox-nav{display:none;}}

/* CONTACT */
.contact-wrap{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:3rem;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.contact-wrap::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at top center,rgba(0,255,65,.05),transparent 60%);pointer-events:none;}
.contact-wrap h2{font-size:clamp(1.4rem,3vw,1.9rem);margin-bottom:.6rem;color:var(--text);}
.contact-wrap p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:2rem;}
.contact-links{display:flex;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.9rem;}
.c-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;padding:.65rem 1.3rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:2px;color:var(--text);text-decoration:none;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.78rem;background:var(--surface);transition:border-color .2s,color .2s,box-shadow .2s;}
.c-link:hover{border-color:var(--green);color:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(0,255,65,.15);}

footer{text-align:center;padding:2rem 5%;border-top:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--muted);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.72rem;position:relative;z-index:1;}

/* CHATBOT */
.chatbot-bubble{position:fixed;bottom:2rem;right:2rem;z-index:300;width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);color:#000;border:none;font-size:1.3rem;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,65,.4);transition:transform .2s;}
.chatbot-bubble:hover{transform:scale(1.1);}
.chatbot-panel{position:fixed;bottom:5.5rem;right:2rem;z-index:300;width:320px;background:#060d06;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.6);display:none;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
.chatbot-panel.open{display:flex;}
.chat-header{background:var(--card);padding:.75rem 1rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.chat-header-info{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;}
.chat-avatar{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);color:#000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;}
.chat-name{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.8rem;color:var(--text);}
.chat-status{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--green);}
.chat-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;}
.chat-messages{height:220px;overflow-y:auto;padding:.75rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.6rem;}
.chat-msg{max-width:85%;padding:.5rem .8rem;border-radius:4px;font-size:.78rem;line-height:1.5;}
.chat-msg.bot{background:var(--card);color:var(--text);align-self:flex-start;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.chat-msg.user{background:rgba(0,255,65,.15);color:var(--green);align-self:flex-end;border:1px solid rgba(0,255,65,.3);}
.chat-quick{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;padding:.5rem .75rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.qbtn{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.65rem;padding:.3rem .6rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:2px;background:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;transition:color .15s,border-color .15s;}
.qbtn:hover{color:var(--green);border-color:var(--green-dim);}
.chat-input-row{display:flex;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.chat-input{flex:1;background:none;border:none;padding:.7rem;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text);outline:none;}
.chat-input::placeholder{color:var(--muted);}
.chat-send{background:none;border:none;padding:.7rem .9rem;color:var(--green);cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;}

.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);transition:opacity .55s ease,transform .55s ease;}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:none;}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   FOOTER
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
footer{
  background:var(--bg);border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:32px 6vw;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;position:relative;z-index:1;
}
.footer-logo{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:900;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;}
.footer-copy{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted)}
.footer-heart{color:var(--accent3)}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   SCROLL REVEAL
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);transition:.7s ease}
.reveal.in{opacity:1;transform:none}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   RESPONSIVE
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
@media(max-width:900px){
  #home{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;align-items:center;padding-top:110px}
  .hero-btns,.hero-tags,.hero-role{justify-content:center}
  .about-grid,.contact-wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .sc1,.sc2{display:none}
  .avatar-wrap{width:220px;height:220px}
  .avatar-img{width:220px;height:220px}
  .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  section{padding:70px 5vw}
}
@media(max-width:640px){
  .nav-links{display:none}
  .hamburger{display:flex}
  .proj-grid,.cp-grid,.qual-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

    
<canvas id="matrixCanvas"></canvas>

<!---------------------NAV------------------->

<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">VIJAYAN.S </div>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="navLinks">
    <li><a href="#about">about</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#education">education</a></li>
    <li><a href="#certificates">certificates</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="hamburger" onclick="document.getElementById('navLinks').classList.toggle('open')">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <p class="hero-prompt">WHO AM I</p>
      <h1 class="hero-name">VIJAYAN S</h1>
      <p class="hero-sub" id="typedSub">&nbsp;<span class="cursor"></span></p>
      <div class="hero-tags">
        <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="VIJAYAN_S_Resume (1).pdf" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary">📄 Resume</a>
      <a href="www.linkedin.com/in/vijayan-vijayan-7770bb383" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline">💼 LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/vijayansaravanan44-glitch" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline2">🐙 GitHub</a>
    </div>

        <span class="htag">Deep Learning</span>
        <span class="htag">Python</span>
        <span class="htag">Data Analysis</span>
        <span class="htag">SQL</span>
        <span class="htag">Computer Vision</span>
        <span class="htag">Automation</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-btns">
        <a href="#projects" class="btn btn-green">./view_projects</a>
        <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-outline">./contact_me</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="terminal">
      <div class="terminal-bar">
        <div class="t-dot r"></div><div class="t-dot y"></div><div class="t-dot g"></div>
        <span class="terminal-title">vijayan_profile.py</span>
      </div>
      <div class="terminal-body">
        <div class="t-line"><span class="t-prompt">$</span><span class="t-cmd">python vijayan_profile.py</span></div>
        <div class="t-out">&nbsp;</div>
        <div class="t-out">name    : <span class="t-hi">Vijayan S</span></div>
        <div class="t-out">role    : <span class="t-hi">AI &amp; Data Science Engineer</span></div>
        <div class="t-out">cgpa    : <span class="t-hi">8.6 / 10.0</span></div>
        <div class="t-out">rank    : <span class="t-hi">Top 10 in class</span></div>
        <div class="t-out">location: <span class="t-hi">Bengaluru, India</span></div>
        <div class="t-out">&nbsp;</div>
        <div class="t-out">skills  : [<span class="t-hi">"Python","SQL","DL","CV"</span>]</div>
        <div class="t-out">projects: <span class="t-hi">3 completed</span></div>
        <div class="t-out">certs   : <span class="t-hi">7 earned</span></div>
        <div class="t-out">&nbsp;</div>
        <div class="t-out">status  : <span class="t-hi">open to opportunities ✓</span></div>
        <div class="t-out">&nbsp;</div>
        <div class="t-cursor-line"><span class="t-prompt">$</span><span class="t-cursor"></span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PHOTO -->
<div class="photo-section reveal">
  <div class="photo-frame-outer">
    <div class="photo-ring"></div>
    <div class="photo-ring-2"></div>
    <div class="photo-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Vijayan S"/>
    </div>
    <div class="bracket tl"></div><div class="bracket tr"></div>
    <div class="bracket bl"></div><div class="bracket br"></div>
    <div class="photo-badge b1">🧠 AI Engineer</div>
    <div class="photo-badge b2">📊 Data Analyst</div>
    <div class="photo-badge b3">🐍 Python Dev</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="sec-header">
    <p class="sec-label">who I am</p>
    <h2 class="sec-title">About Me</h2>
    <hr class="sec-divider"/>
  </div>
  <div class="about-grid reveal">
    <div class="about-text">
      <p>I'm <strong>Vijayan S</strong>, a B.Tech student in <strong>Artificial Intelligence and Data Science</strong> at Anna University, Bengaluru — ranked in the <strong>top 10 of my class</strong> with a CGPA of 8.6.</p>
      <p>I'm passionate about turning raw data into insight and building adaptive AI systems. My work spans computer vision research, retail analytics, and automation — all grounded in a problem-first mindset developed through internships and real-world projects.</p>
      <p>I pick up new concepts fast and apply them immediately. Whether it's cleaning messy datasets or designing precision segmentation algorithms, I bring curiosity and rigour to every challenge.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-grid">
      <div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-num">8.7</div><div class="stat-lbl">CGPA · Anna University</div></div>
      <div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-num">3+</div><div class="stat-lbl">Projects delivered</div></div>
      <div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-num">2</div><div class="stat-lbl">Internships</div></div>
      <div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-num">7</div><div class="stat-lbl">Certifications earned</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section id="skills">
  <div class="sec-header">
    <p class="sec-label">what I work with</p>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Skills</h2>
    <hr class="sec-divider"/>
  </div>
  <div class="skills-terminal reveal">
    <div class="terminal-bar">
      <div class="t-dot r"></div><div class="t-dot y"></div><div class="t-dot g"></div>
      <span class="terminal-title">skills.list</span>
    </div>
    <div class="skills-body">
      <div class="skill-item">Python</div><div class="skill-item">SQL</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Data Analysis</div><div class="skill-item">Deep Learning</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Machine Learning</div><div class="skill-item">Computer Vision</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Data Visualisation</div><div class="skill-item">Data Cleaning</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Automation (UiPath)</div><div class="skill-item">React JS</div>
      <div class="skill-item">HTML</div><div class="skill-item">Power BI</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Pandas / Matplotlib</div><div class="skill-item">Jupyter / Colab</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Excel</div><div class="skill-item">Reporting</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="sec-header">
    <p class="sec-label">what I've built</p>
    <h2 class="sec-title">Projects</h2>
    <hr class="sec-divider"/>
  </div>
  <div class="proj-grid reveal">
    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-top"><div class="proj-icon">🎯</div><div class="proj-period">Jan 2026 – Apr 2026</div></div>
      <h3 class="proj-title">ROI Segmentation in Video Sequences for Multi-Object Retrieval</h3>

<!-- LIGHTBOX -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox" onclick="closeLight(event)">
  <div class="lightbox-inner">
    <button class="lightbox-nav prev" onclick="navLight(-1)">&#8249;</button>
    <button class="lightbox-nav next" onclick="navLight(1)">&#8250;</button>
    <button class="lightbox-close" onclick="closeLightDirect()">✕</button>
    <img id="lightboxImg" src="" alt=""/>
    <div class="lightbox-caption" id="lightboxCap"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CHATBOT -->
<button class="chatbot-bubble" onclick="toggleChat()" title="Chat with VS Bot">🤖</button>
<div class="chatbot-panel" id="chatPanel">
  <div class="chat-header">
    <div class="chat-header-info">
      <div class="chat-avatar">VS</div>
      <div><div class="chat-name">VS Assistant</div><div class="chat-status">● Online</div></div>
    </div>
    <button class="chat-close" onclick="toggleChat()">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="chat-messages" id="chatMessages">
    <div class="chat-msg bot">Hi! I'm VS Bot 👋 Ask me anything about Vijayan's skills, projects, certificates or experience.</div>
  </div>
  <div class="chat-quick">
    <button class="qbtn" onclick="quickAsk('Skills')">Skills</button>
    <button class="qbtn" onclick="quickAsk('Projects')">Projects</button>
    <button class="qbtn" onclick="quickAsk('Certificates')">Certs</button>
    <button class="qbtn" onclick="quickAsk('Contact')">Contact</button>
  </div>
  <div class="chat-input-row">
    <input class="chat-input" id="chatInput" placeholder="Ask something..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')sendChat()"/>
    <button class="chat-send" onclick="sendChat()">➤</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
/* ── MATRIX CANVAS — full page ── */
(function(){
  const canvas = document.getElementById('matrixCanvas');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  let cols, drops;
  const chars = '01アイウエオカキクABCDEF#$%&01'.split('');
  const fontSize = 13;

  function resize(){
    canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
    cols = Math.floor(canvas.width / fontSize);
    drops = Array(cols).fill(1);
  }
  resize();
  window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

  function draw(){
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10,14,10,0.05)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    ctx.fillStyle = '#00ff41';
    ctx.font = fontSize + 'px Fira Code, monospace';
    for(let i=0; i<cols; i++){
      const ch = chars[Math.floor(Math.random()*chars.length)];
      ctx.fillText(ch, i*fontSize, drops[i]*fontSize);
      if(drops[i]*fontSize > canvas.height && Math.random() > 0.975) drops[i] = 0;
      drops[i]++;
    }
  }
  setInterval(draw, 50);
})();

/* ── TYPING ── */
(function(){
  const el = document.getElementById('typedSub');
  const phrases = ['AI & Data Science Engineer','Deep Learning Researcher','Data Analyst','Python Developer','RPA Automation Developer'];
  let pi=0,ci=0,del=false;
  function tick(){
    const phrase=phrases[pi];
    if(!del){ci++;el.innerHTML=phrase.slice(0,ci)+'<span class="cursor"></span>';if(ci===phrase.length){del=true;setTimeout(tick,2000);return;}}
    else{ci--;el.innerHTML=phrase.slice(0,ci)+'<span class="cursor"></span>';if(ci===0){del=false;pi=(pi+1)%phrases.length;}}
    setTimeout(tick,del?55:85);
  }tick();
})();

/* ── SCROLL REVEAL ── */
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(e=>{e.forEach(x=>{if(x.isIntersecting){x.target.classList.add('visible');obs.unobserve(x.target);}});},{threshold:0.08});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));

/* ── CERT FILTER ── */
function filterCerts(cat, btn){
  document.querySelectorAll('.cert-filter-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.cert-card').forEach(c=>{
    if(cat==='all'||c.dataset.cat===cat) c.classList.remove('hidden');
    else c.classList.add('hidden');
  });
}

/* ── LIGHTBOX ── */
const certData = [
  {src:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',cap:'Diploma in Computer Application — SRM Infotech (2022)'},
  {src:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',cap:'Precise Energy 2023 Olympiad — Final Stage Participant'},
  {src:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',cap:'UiPath RPA Foundation Course — Diploma of Completion (2024)'},
  {src:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',cap:'GB Tech Corp — Data Analytics Internship (Jul–Aug 2025)'},
  {src:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',cap:'VEI Technologies — React JS Full Stack Internship (2024)'},
  {src:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',cap:'VEI Technologies — Value Added Course React JS (2024)'},
  {src:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',cap:'VCODEZ — Data Science Internship Experience Letter (2026)'},
];
let curIdx=0;
function openLight(i){
  curIdx=i;
  document.getElementById('lightboxImg').src=certData[i].src;
  document.getElementById('lightboxCap').textContent=certData[i].cap;
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
}
function closeLightDirect(){
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='';
}
function closeLight(e){if(e.target===document.getElementById('lightbox'))closeLightDirect();}
function navLight(dir){
  curIdx=(curIdx+dir+certData.length)%certData.length;
  document.getElementById('lightboxImg').src=certData[curIdx].src;
  document.getElementById('lightboxCap').textContent=certData[curIdx].cap;
}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
  if(document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.contains('open')){
    if(e.key==='Escape')closeLightDirect();
    if(e.key==='ArrowRight')navLight(1);
    if(e.key==='ArrowLeft')navLight(-1);
  }
});

/* ── CHATBOT ── */
const botK={
  skills:'Vijayan is skilled in Python, SQL, Data Analysis, Machine Learning, Computer Vision,Power BI, Pandas,Numpy, Jupyter/Colab, and Excel.',
  projects:'3 projects: (1) ROI Segmentation in Video Sequences — Deep Learning polygon segmentation. (2) Adaptive Intelligence Engine — predicting skill evolution. (3) Retail Sales Analysis — end-to-end retail analytics.',
  experience:'3 internships: VCodez (Oct 2025–Jan 2026, Data Science), GB Tech Corp (Jul–Aug 2025, Data Analytics), VEI Technologies (Aug–Nov 2024, React JS Full Stack).',
  contact:'Email: vijayansaravanan44@gmail.com | Phone: +91 93420 56608 | Bengaluru, India.',
  education:'B.Tech AI & Data Science at Anna University — 8.7 CGPA, Top 10 in class.',
  certificates:'7 certificates: SRM Infotech Diploma (Computer Application), Precise Energy 2023 Olympiad, UiPath RPA Diploma, GB Tech Corp Internship, VEI Technologies Internship (React JS), VEI Value Added Course, VCODEZ Experience Letter.',
};
function toggleChat(){document.getElementById('chatPanel').classList.toggle('open');}
function addMsg(txt,role){const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='chat-msg '+role;d.textContent=txt;const m=document.getElementById('chatMessages');m.appendChild(d);m.scrollTop=m.scrollHeight;}
function botReply(q){const l=q.toLowerCase();if(l.includes('skill'))return botK.skills;if(l.includes('project'))return botK.projects;if(l.includes('exp')||l.includes('intern')||l.includes('work'))return botK.experience;if(l.includes('contact')||l.includes('email')||l.includes('phone'))return botK.contact;if(l.includes('edu')||l.includes('cgpa')||l.includes('study'))return botK.education;if(l.includes('cert')||l.includes('achieve'))return botK.certificates;return"I can answer about Skills, Projects, Experience, Education, Certificates, or Contact. What would you like to know?";}
function sendChat(){const i=document.getElementById('chatInput');const q=i.value.trim();if(!q)return;addMsg(q,'user');i.value='';setTimeout(()=>addMsg(botReply(q),'bot'),380);}
function quickAsk(t){addMsg(t,'user');setTimeout(()=>addMsg(botReply(t),'bot'),350);}
</script>
</body>
</html>
